description: I’ve been using empower for two years, and it’s made a huge difference in how my team creates presentations. It helps with design, layout, and template management, making sure everything stays on-brand and consistent across our team. If you create PowerPoint presentations regularly, empower is a great tool. It’s made my workflow faster and smoother, and I’d definitely recommend it. Given how much time it saves and the quality it ensures, I think it’s a solid investment.
author: Paula B.
pros: The layout tools, design checks, and shared library make it easy to create polished presentations quickly. I don’t have to worry about slides looking messy or off-brand. It is also great for team collaboration - everyone uses the same templates and assets, so there’s no confusion or outdated slides floating around. The ability to automate updates across slides is a huge plus. If something goes wrong, the support team is quick, helpful, and patient. They even record troubleshooting videos, which saves time when similar issues pop up later.
cons: I find it intuitive, but some colleagues struggle with certain features. A proper onboarding might help, but with busy schedules, that’s not always easy.

description: Good | can be recommended to office team members Floating license/ trial version access if offered, should make experience best.
author: Vignesh J.
pros: Easy to use | Support from team if in any need is appropriate, precise | Auto renewal option is working well.
cons: Migration of existing charts from old file (made with old version) to current version takes time. The migration shouldn't take much time. Can have floating license for use between team (even for single use) to promote usage.

description: Terrible. I’m not really sure how there are this many positive reviews. Terrible software that my company forces me to use. Please fix this.
author: Christian D.
pros: Some of the features are a little easier to manipulate than the default PowerPoint features. Looks pretty professional at the end.
cons: It’s the buggiest, slowest, most aggravating thing to ever happen to PowerPoint. In fact, I’m typing this in between clicks while working in empower. If I open up a chart and manipulate data, half the time it completely crashes PowerPoint and I lose all my work. The other half of the time it takes upwards of a minute in between clicks for PowerPoint to catch up. At this point, I would seriously consider empower to be malware. This is no hyperbole. This has been a common theme despite multiple updates over the last 2 years.

description: Very good. I use it on a wide variety of presentations. I particularly like the slide library function, to store and re-use slides
author: David H.
pros: Great charts. Simple side bar to navigate a wide range of formatting options without having to search through menus. Access to a wide range of icons and images. Excellent charting tools
cons: Can slow down Powerpoint after a while. I find I have to restart Powerpoint after a couple of hours of use.

description: Overall, empower has been a smooth and efficient addition to PowerPoint, offering great functionality and fair value.
author: Jarrad C.
pros: Overall, the software performs as expected. It offers useful, easy-to-use functionality for charts, particularly Gantt charts, which are valuable for project management. Empower also provides a convenient and intuitive PowerPoint plug-in that streamlines slide creation and formatting.
cons: The main drawback is that it can slow PowerPoint’s performance. Additionally, if the empower plug-in is uninstalled or the service drops out for any reason, I’m unable to update or modify any charts previously created through empower within PowerPoint.

description: No new chart features - types and more customization. Others catching up. No AI feature either
author: Daniel L.
pros: Chart customization. Corporate templates
cons: Slow. Getting worse occasionally annoying intertepting formal presentation as it hangs

description: I have been subscribed Empower for many years and I am very satisfied.
author: Xuyang Z.
pros: I could change templates quickly, and select the content form the library.
cons: Each time, it requires assistance from the customer service staff when I upload the template.

description: I'm regretting the purchase because of the template formatting option limitations.
author: Fernando B.
pros: I like the convenience of having ready made and formatted charts, tables, etc.
cons: It doesn't allow me to change my preferred theme. The default preference for Empower Express is a light background, however, our organization's PowerPoint templates are dark backgrounds with white or light text. This make working with Empower Express tedious because I have to wasting time changing the colors.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Empower empower users more, great product overall
description: It’s a well designed product and the support model is top notch
author: Jeff E.
pros: Lots of customizable icons, photos, graphics
cons: Templates are too rigid. Performance seems slow but that could be a mixture of causes
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great customer service, robust, useful tool.
author: Clarisse S.
pros: Easy to convert templates, translate decks and formatting. It's a great tool
cons: Sometimes the sync can be a bit slow, but it’s not a big deal.
author_profession: Chief Knowledge Office and Founding Partner

review_title: It would have been cool to have had the solution earlier...
description: Very good onboarding process and top support. Short ROI because everything can be used productively quickly.
author: Dino E.
pros: The logic for working with the templates and with the library for the individual elements.
cons: That the express suite (recommended for small businesses) does not provide the full range of functions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall experience has been great. Very responsive support and the integration of specific customer templates works perfect.
author: Martin K.
pros: It’s a powerful tool, which allows to produce professional PowerPoint presentation with significantly reduced time. Very valuable for freelancers.
cons: I haven’t experienced any dislikes yet - it doesn’t come cheap but at the end it’s value for money.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great tool to keep you presentations in sync
description: Great experience. Haven't found any similar tool that works on a mac.
author: Niek V.
pros: Solves the problem of sharing slides across presentations and not being able to keep the changes on the same slides current across presentations.
cons: A slight learning curve to get started, but otherwise no problems.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Very easy to use, I love the icons, images that are placed and can be replaced automatically. I also like the translation option and the numerous of templates, infographics and inspiration material
author: Ioannis M.
pros: We use Empower daily. We have designed thousand of slides for our clients. It is easy to use and learn. It helps us minimize our time by 60-70%. We also like the automated consistency check tools.
cons: Maybe some more functionalities would be great.

review_title: The Complete Package: Empower Software Features and Support
description: It is a valuable tool that has helped increase our productivity in our lab. The user interface is easy to use, making it a great asset to our operations. The centralized database allows us to access and track our data more easily, and the customizable reports are great for keeping us on track.Empower offers great help and support, which has saved us a lot of time and money when it comes to training.The software has security features that are comparable to those used in industry-leading laboratories. These features help keep your data safe.
author: Brizl P.
pros: It is a great tool for managing chromatography data. It's easy to use and provides lots of helpful features, like customizable reports and regulatory compliance features. I especially appreciate the intuitive interface and the fact that it's fast and easy to collect and process data. Plus, the customer support is great, so if I ever have any questions, I know I can get help right away. Overall, Empower is an excellent solution for managing chromatography data.
cons: It has a lot of features and it is easy to use. However, there are some downsides to it. The user interface can be confusing, and there have been times when the software has slowed down or crashed. Additionally, the support organization is good, but you need to contact them more often than you'd like.

review_title: One of the best on the market for Office accelerators
author: Georgi S.
pros: More functionalities especially requested by Sales&Marketing Better update and distributing function Shared-Slide Management including Updates Design Checker Automatic update notifications whenever an element was updated in the Slide Library Rights management via Active Directory (incl. AD groups) All content available offline due to a synchronized Slide Library
cons: - integration with other collaboration (Sharepoint, Confluence, Jira) platforms could be better

author: Julia V.
pros: Empower helps to work faster and more effectively across the company. I love the "Layout Tools".
cons: Unfortunately, the important function of linking to presentations and folders in the library no longer exists. I would like to see special features that simplify, make more flexible and extend the creation and editing of animations in PowerPoint.

description: My overall experience ahs been a nice one
author: Dean F.
pros: The fact that it's easily accessible and gives value for money
cons: Just a few bad cons as it could run slower on small sized devices

review_title: Allround Tool that helps creating more appealing, effective and interactive Presentations.
author: Laura K.
pros: The library function is great as all colleagues have access to the same content and templates. With only a few clicks you have a selection of many icons, templates, slides, content - helps creating more professional slide decks.
cons: I think AI features are missing. Comparable tools already have the ability to use AI generated content/templates which is very helpful and saves a lot of time and effort.

author: Tobias S.
pros: - Central corporate library to provide best practices centrally available to entire team- Agenda function- Possibility to save content in own user library
cons: Some optimization potentials for various functions (however, empower is constantly developing)

review_title: In the first month you will earn back your yearly licence fee
description: Like the tool a lot and also the support team is very good
author: Thijs W.
pros: Ease to work on lay out and the use of the library
cons: Not all functions, such as automatic translation, are easily found

description: We are looking for a solution to improve our presentations, also for the marketing area, that facilitates and improves reports and reports specifically in power point, empower is an excellent tool
author: Victor G.
pros: with this feature we can modernize the presentations, currently I use it is powerpoint, not only does it have a good gallery of images, it has more functions that help you correct errors organize your presentations so that they are more attractive when presenting an important report, very well this function of empower in power point
cons: like everything new that one does not know, at first it took me a while to understand it, but in 2 or 3 days I was up to date with the basic functionalities

review_title: Create appealing presentations quickly and easily within the corporate design
author: Anna U.
pros: The empower toolbar which offers some tools to work quickly and accurately
cons: The bugs that often come with the next update

description: empower slides is easy to use and helps users to centrally manage important PowerPoint slides e.g. for monthly reportings. It informs the consumers of presentations about newer versions of slides and ensures that up-to-date information is communicated/presented
author: Johann O.
pros: provide collections of single slides which can be edited by their authors individually organize slides in a folder hierarchy with fine granular permissions
cons: The administration requires a deeper Windows server and SQL database knowledge. I am missing an administration cockpit/UI.

author: Shre J.
pros: Includes everything in one tool - charts, productivity etc.
cons: Charts are not so easy to use compared to other tools like Think-cell
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
